content.raw:
Dr. Jorge Rocha is a biological and biomimetic dentist at BioDent Smile , dedicated to treating patients with a whole-body approach. At his boutique practice, BioDent Smile, he integrates advanced technology—including CBCT imaging, Fotona laser therapy, and same-day ceramic restorations—with holistic protocols that prioritize safety, minimally invasive care, and patient education. He follows the IABDM Protect Protocol and standards to ensure comprehensive biological dentistry.

Fluent in both English and Spanish, Dr. Rocha connects with a diverse community and emphasizes the vital link between oral health and overall wellness. He enjoys golf, endurance training, and continuing education to constantly expand his ability to deliver dentistry that is both biologically safe and aesthetically life-enhancing.

content.raw:
Groton Wellness is a comprehensive, health-focused biological dentistry and integrative wellness center located in Groton, Massachusetts. For over two decades, our practice has been dedicated to understanding and treating the mouth as an integral part of the whole-body system, combining advanced dental care with functional and holistic medicine principles.

Led by Dr. Jean Nordin, our clinical approach emphasizes biocompatibility, minimally invasive techniques, and the connection between oral conditions and systemic health. We specialize in advanced surgical procedures including ceramic (zirconia) implants, safe mercury amalgam removal (SMART protocol), cavitation (CSR) treatment, extractions, bone grafting, and full-mouth rehabilitation—always guided by comprehensive 3D diagnostics such as CBCT and advanced visualization technologies.

Our practice is distinguished by ongoing collaboration with internationally recognized researchers and clinicians, including Prof. Shahram Ghanaati, DDS, MD, PhD, integrating techniques such as Guided Open Wound Healing to support optimal healing and long-term outcomes.

Beyond dentistry, Groton Wellness offers a fully integrated model of care that includes functional medicine, health coaching, spa therapies, nutrition, and fitness programs. This multidisciplinary approach allows us to support patients not only in resolving dental concerns, but in achieving lasting improvements in overall health and vitality.

At Groton Wellness, we are committed to education, innovation, and patient-centered care—empowering individuals to make informed decisions about their health through a truly integrative and biological approach to dentistry.
content.rendered:

We specialize in advanced surgical procedures including ceramic (zirconia) implants, safe mercury amalgam removal (SMART protocol), cavitation (CSR) treatment, extractions, bone grafting, and full-mouth rehabilitation—always guided by comprehensive 3D diagnostics such as CBCT and advanced visualization technologies.

Our practice is distinguished by ongoing collaboration with internationally recognized researchers and clinicians, including Prof. Shahram Ghanaati, DDS, MD, PhD, integrating techniques such as Guided Open Wound Healing to support optimal healing and long-term outcomes.

Beyond dentistry, Groton Wellness offers a fully integrated model of care that includes functional medicine, health coaching, spa therapies, nutrition, and fitness programs. At Groton Wellness, we are committed to education, innovation, and patient-centered care—empowering individuals to make informed decisions about their health through a truly integrative and biological approach to dentistry.

street: 1253 W El Camino Real Suite B

content.raw: At our practice, we are passionate about delivering exceptional dental care with a holistic approach that prioritizes your overall health. We believe your mouth is deeply connected to the rest of your body, and the materials, treatments, and infections within your oral cavity can profoundly impact your systemic well-being. That’s why we’ve crafted a philosophy of care centered on gentle, conservative, and minimally invasive dentistry—always tailored to your unique needs.

content.raw:
Golden Dental Biologics is a biological dentistry practice led by Dr. Linda Golden, DDS, focused on integrative, patient-centered care that respects the oral–systemic connection. With more than 36 years of clinical experience, Dr. Golden has intentionally evolved her practice from conventional and cosmetic dentistry into holistic, functional, and now biologically guided oral surgery and restorative care.

Practicing within Al Dente Dental Spa in Roslyn Heights, New York, Golden Dental Biologics emphasizes biocompatible materials, minimally invasive surgical techniques, and regenerative protocols designed to support the body’s natural healing capacity. Services include ceramic (metal-free) implants, safe mercury amalgam removal, biologically guided extractions, PRF/Alb-PRF therapies, ozone applications, advanced imaging, and personalized treatment planning informed by biological testing when appropriate.

Dr. Golden works collaboratively with functional and integrative healthcare providers and frequently cares for patients who are seeking a deeper evaluation of oral health as part of their overall wellness journey. Her practice prioritizes education, informed consent, and careful preparation before surgical intervention, with attention to immune readiness, inflammation, and long-term stability.

Golden Dental Biologics serves individuals and families locally, as well as patients coordinating care across multidisciplinary and international biological dental networks. The practice is grounded in the IABDM philosophy of whole-body dentistry, clinical integrity, and ongoing education.

content.raw: Over the past 20+ years, Dr. Boyajian has worked on creating an exceptional dental care experience that is personalized for each patient. His practice philosophy is “to move the patient forward in their oral health journey from wherever they are physically and emotionally”. He and his team of dental professionals offer holistic dentistry services to patients looking to maintain or achieve a beautiful smile. Dr. Boyajian provides a range of services in cosmetic and aesthetic restorative dentistry, TMJ treatment, and sedation dentistry. In addition to general dentistry, Dr. Boyajian provides Ozone therapy in most procedures. Ozone kills microscopic germs and stimulates healthy cell function.

title.raw: Alexander Volchonok, DMD MS FICOI FIALD
title.rendered: Alexander Volchonok, DMD MS FICOI FIALD

content.raw:
Dr. Alex Volchonok is a dual Ivy-League trained Biologic and Board-certified periodontist and implant surgeon with a clinical focus on biologic and oral-systemic dentistry. He is the Founder and CEO of TetraHealth Dentistry, with practices in New York City and Greenwich, Connecticut.

Dr. Volchonok integrates evidence-based biologic protocols with advanced periodontal and surgical care, emphasizing the connection between oral health and whole-body wellness. His clinical interests include laser periodontal therapy (LANAP), zirconia implants, cavitation surgery, oral microbiome assessment, ozone and PRF therapies, and airway-centered, interdisciplinary care.

He is an active member of the International Academy of Biological Dentistry and Medicine and is committed to patient education, collaboration with integrative medical providers, and advancing the role of biologic dentistry in preventive and restorative healthcare.

He is an active member of the International Academy of Biological Dentistry and Medicine and is committed to patient education, collaboration with integrative medical providers, and advancing the role of biologic dentistry in preventive and restorative healthcare.

content.raw:
Dr. Jessica (she/her) is a biomimetic and biologic dentist with over eight years of experience. She graduated from Boston University Goldman School of Dental Medicine, then did her advanced general dental residency at the University of California Los Angeles. She is passionate about whole-body health, the oral-systemic connection, and a holistic approach to dental care. Born and raised in Vancouver, she has spent the past five years practicing in New York City, where she honed her expertise in biomimetic dentistry and integrative oral health.

Her advanced training focuses on biomimetic dentistry, TMD management, airway and sleep health, minimally invasive oral surgery, implants, and reducing oral contributions to chronic pain. She is also conversationally fluent in Cantonese and Mandarin.

Dr. Jessica is also a member of the Academy of Biomimetic Dentistry, the International Academy of Oral Medicine and Toxicology, the American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry, and is a diplomat of the the American Sleep and Breathing Academy.

Outside of dentistry, she enjoys snowboarding, dancing, and traveling. She also designs and makes her own tooth gems and grillz.

content.raw: Dr. Mckinnon Forbes earned his Bachelor of Science degree in public health at Clemson University and his Doctor of Dental Surgery degree at Stony Brook School of Dental Medicine. He also bravely served as an infantry officer and dentist in the U.S. Army for 8 years. While a fourth generation dentist, Dr. Forbes found his calling in dentistry because of the enjoyment he gets from helping patients and working with his hands. He is passionate about caring for his patients' entire well-being through a holistic approach and uses his extensive experience to provide the highest level of dental care in a gentle, compassionate manner. During his free time, Dr. Forbes can be found spending time with his four beautiful children and wife, Andrea.

content.raw: Dr. Monica Atallah is a biological dentist and co-founder of Aura Dental & Wellness, a modern practice focused on biocompatible, whole body centered dental care. She is passionate about the oral systemic connection and integrates minimally invasive dentistry, low toxin materials, ozone therapy, and individualized preventive strategies to support long term health. Dr. Atallah emphasizes patient education, personalized treatment planning, and a calm, supportive clinical experience. Her approach blends evidence-based dentistry with a holistic philosophy that respects the body’s natural healing capacity.

content.raw: I practiced conventional dentistry for 17 years before a personal health journey led me to understand the importance of a biological approach to dentistry and overall health. My care and attention lean toward supporting the factors in the mouth that contribute to healthy and strong airways, which in turn support better sleep. Better sleep means better healing. Thus, the mouth's support of the rest of the body is rewarded by the body supporting the mouth. It is a beautiful science. I'd be thrilled to join you on your health journey.

My care and attention lean toward supporting the factors in the mouth that contribute to healthy and strong airways, which in turn support better sleep. Better sleep means better healing. Thus, the mouth’s support of the rest of the body is rewarded by the body supporting the mouth. It is a beautiful science. I’d be thrilled to join you on your health journey.

content.raw:
For Dr. Derrick Johnson, dentistry has always been about more than just teeth—it’s about listening to patients and helping them reclaim their health and confidence. With nearly three decades of experience, he has built his practice on a foundational belief: oral health is central to whole-body health, and every patient deserves personalized care in an environment where they feel heard and genuinely valued.

After earning his dental degree from Ohio State University in 1995, Dr. Johnson pursued advanced training in implantology and reconstructive biological dentistry, driven by a commitment to offering his patients the very best. He has invested thousands of hours studying with leading experts across the United States, Italy, Germany, and Switzerland, always seeking innovations that make a meaningful difference in people’s lives. This dedication has earned him Fellowship status in the International Congress of Oral Implantology and the Academy of General Dentistry, along with accredited memberships in organizations dedicated to advancing safe, metal-free biological dental solutions, including the International Academy of Oral Medicine and Toxicology and the International Academy of Biological Dentistry and Medicine.

What truly sets Dr. Johnson apart is his ability to connect. Patients often say they’ve finally found someone who listens—who takes time to understand their concerns and explains everything in clear, straightforward terms. He has helped countless people resolve chronic dental issues they had been struggling with for years, often when they had nearly given up hope.

Outside the practice, Dr. Johnson strives to live the balanced, active lifestyle he promotes for his patients. You’ll often find him mountain biking or hiking with his wife Natalia and their dog Enzo. He is an instrument-rated pilot and an avid tennis player. As a father of two adventurous daughters who share his passion for travel, he has learned that the best moments often happen outdoors, exploring new places and embracing what the natural world has to offer.

What truly sets Dr. Johnson apart is his ability to connect. Patients often say they’ve finally found someone who listens—who takes time to understand their concerns and explains everything in clear, straightforward terms. As a father of two adventurous daughters who share his passion for travel, he has learned that the best moments often happen outdoors, exploring new places and embracing what the natural world has to offer.

content.raw:
Following is my “About me” page on my website which I thought would be good starting point to introduce myself. You can also find me on Instagram @tduymaz .

“Hello,

I created this website to share the knowledge I have gleaned from reading about functional / holistic medicine, which has grown in popularity in our country in recent years, and to connect with others who are striving to take charge of their own health.

During my readings, I came across biological dentistry and began to see the role of dentistry in our overall health, and both the way I work and the content of the site began to shift. Therefore, you can find here articles on both whole body health and functional medicine as well as on how oral health has an impact on our overall health.

Let me briefly describe my educational background and professional experience. After earning my dental degree from Marmara University’s Faculty of Dentistry in 2006, I began working for myself. The mechanized nature of our work began to annoy me after five years of working as a general dentist, and I wasn’t intellectually content. I was not aware of the actual worth of my activities as a dentist, despite the fact that I was aware that oral illnesses in general could worsen the development of many systemic diseases. At that time, I was also ignorant of many of the biological dentistry-related topics. For example, although I never placed amalgam fillings, I did not know that I had to take precautions while removing it. I did not feel the need to question what was taught in dental school on subjects like fluoride, cavity prevention, toxic materials, etc.

Almost every topic in science has always attracted me. One of my long-standing interests was the brain and how it worked. During this period where I was disappointed with my job and was searching for a better cause for my life, I came across the “Cognitive Science” Msc. program at Boğaziçi University. Since I could not apply here as a dentist, I thought of entering a department where I could at least take courses on the subject by taking the university entrance exam once again. I got into the Department of Western Languages and Literatures at Boğaziçi University. Since a versatile education was supported here, I was able to take courses that I was interested in such as “Psychology”, “Neuroscience”, “Brain and Language”. During this period, I was still running my dental office, but shortly after I decided to take a break.

After 3 years at Bogazici University, I left in 2013 after my daughter’s birth. While I was researching how I should introduce new foods to my daughter’s diet, I came across the information that Hasimato’s disease which I was diagnosed with years before, could be healed by diet and life style changes. I also have had vitiligo and I realized that they are all connected and the root causes may even pave the way for a third autoimmune disease! I then started a gluten-free diet first, then had an intolerance testing, then I tried different diets, I used supplements, etc.… Then I realized that it’s not just about removing some foods and taking some vitamins. Hidden infections in the body, toxic heavy metal burden, sleep, stress, sunlight, breathing are all a part of the equation. There were many layers to work on.

By that time, I had started to work as a dentist again, but I still had not fully met biological dentistry yet.

Then we moved to Plovdiv, Bulgaria for about 2 years because of my husband’s job, where I found the chance to totally focus on my well-being. It was the time I started writing my website. Meanwhile, in Turkey functional medicine was still too little known and Turkish sources were very limited or superficial. Owing to my website and social media, I met many new people with similar interests.

It was also during this period that I got to know biological dentistry better and took the first steps for the changes I will make when I return. I started doing research on many subjects such as amalgam fillings, toxicity, ceramic implants, cavitations, oral microbiome, teeth with root canal treatment, etc.

I got many good results in my own health by the help of functional medicine. I have made a great improvement in my vitiligo lesions that should not heal according to classical medicine. My thyroid antibodies dropped and I managed to reduce the amount of thyroid medication I needed.My energy and motivation have increased. I got rid of many ailments such as rosacea, bloating, sinusitis, depression, headaches, weakness and irritability, which reduced my quality of life.

In early 2018 after returning to Turkey, I adopted a purely biological dentistry approach. I was the first dentist in Turkey to remove amalgam fillings with 100% compliance with the SMART protocol. I became one of the first practitioners in Turkey who use ceramic implants as part of my biological dentistry approach. I started to attend international congresses and courses in order to learn more about different applications of biological dentistry. Now I look at my profession very differently because I feel that I can be more beneficial for my patients.

Even though I am inevitably a “practitioner” who still does fillings and implants -ceramic ones:)-, my main goal is to contribute to a better understanding that oral health is the gateway to your overall health and we cannot stop chronic disease without solving the problems in the mouth first."

Now I look at my profession very differently because I feel that I can be more beneficial for my patients.

Even though I am inevitably a “practitioner” who still does fillings and implants -ceramic ones:)-, my main goal is to contribute to a better understanding that oral health is the gateway to your overall health and we cannot stop chronic disease without solving the problems in the mouth first.”

content.raw:
Dr. Christi Wengler is a holistic pediatric dentist and founder of Wellness Pediatric Dentistry & Airway in San Antonio, Texas. She is passionate about taking a whole-body, prevention-focused approach—understanding that oral health is deeply connected to how children breathe, sleep, grow, and thrive.

With over a decade of experience, including 11 years of service in the U.S. Air Force, Dr. Wengler brings both clinical expertise and a heart for service to every patient she treats. She has a special focus on airway dentistry, helping identify early signs of mouth breathing, poor sleep, and developmental concerns so children can feel and function at their best.

Dr. Wengler offers fluoride-free options and believes in empowering parents with education and choices. A San Antonio native and mom of three, she is committed to supporting families with compassionate, individualized care that prioritizes long-term health, not just teeth.

content.raw:
Dr. Carla Schweer is a dedicated biological dentist with over 10 years of experience in holistic and biocompatible dental care. In 2018, she established herself in Dubai, and started to develope biodentistry in the pratice where she worked. She has the distinction of being the only AIAOMT-certified biodentist in the UAE at this time (2025).

As a SMART-certified practitioner, Dr. Carla Schweer follows the Safe Mercury Amalgam Removal Technique, combining strict safety protocols with advanced tools such as ozone therapy and ceramic (zirconia) implants. Her approach is deeply rooted in the belief that true dental care supports the entire body — a philosophy that drives her passion for health optimization, detoxification, and nutrition.

She is also trained by the renowned Swiss Biohealth Clinic in Switzerland, further enriching her expertise in biological and minimally invasive dentistry.

Dr. Carla Schweer is proud to join the IABDM family, aligning with a global community committed to evidence-based, health-centered dentistry that honors the connection between oral and overall wellness.

Dr. Carla Schweer is proud to join the IABDM family, aligning with a global community committed to evidence-based, health-centered dentistry that honors the connection between oral and overall wellness.

content.raw: Dr. Hartwell and his team are passionate about providing exceptional dental care with a personal touch. We prioritize building positive relationships by taking the time for personalized discussions. Our "Total Health" approach embodies holistic dentistry, looking beyond teeth to overall wellness. Consequently, we are well-versed in materials biocompatibility, are mercury safe and taking time to speak, listen and connect. When necessary, Dr. Hartwell collaborates with doctors, naturopaths, and specialists to identify potential health issues and help patients achieve optimal health. By leveraging advanced technology and dedicating time to meticulous planning, we ensure efficient, effective procedures with superior outcomes.

title.raw: L. James Chau DDS, AEGD, FIADFE
title.rendered: L. James Chau DDS, AEGD, FIADFE

content.raw: Dr. L. James Chau: A Life of Dedication, Excellence, and Service Dr. L. James Chau’s journey is a testament to unwavering dedication, remarkable achievement, and a profound commitment to serving others—both in his community and across the globe. Born in Vietnam and raised in the vibrant city of San Diego, California, Dr. Chau exhibited academic excellence from an early age, graduating as Valedictorian of his high school class in 2001. He continued his pursuit of knowledge at the University of California, San Diego, where he graduated Magna Cum Laude with Provost’s Honors, laying the foundation for an extraordinary career in dentistry. Recognized for his exceptional promise, Dr. Chau was awarded a full scholarship to the prestigious New York University (NYU) College of Dentistry, one of the nation’s foremost institutions. His commitment to clinical excellence led him to NYU Langone Hospital, where he completed an Advanced Education in General Dentistry (AEGD) residency. There, his dedication to patient care earned him the Outstanding Service Award for Patient Care, a reflection of his compassion, skill, and pursuit of excellence. As past President of the American Dental Education Association (ADEA) – NYU Chapter and a member of NYU’s Ethics Peer Review Board, he played a vital role in upholding the highest standards of integrity within the profession. Dr. Chau’s passion for service extended beyond the clinic. As a National Health Service Corps Scholar, he fulfilled a significant service commitment with the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, providing critical dental care to underserved communities. Upon returning to Southern California, he established his practice in Newport Beach, where he seamlessly blends his extensive expertise with a heartfelt dedication to patient care. His commitment to innovation and excellence recently earned him the distinction of Certified Fellow in BioMimetic Dentistry, making him the only dentist in Orange County—and one of just ten worldwide—to hold this prestigious title, awarded by the Academy of BioMimetic Dentistry. Beyond his professional endeavors, Dr. Chau is a man of diverse passions. His artistic eye finds expression in photography, capturing breathtaking landscapes and high-fashion portraits. A fluent speaker of both Vietnamese and English, he fosters an inclusive and welcoming environment for patients from all backgrounds. His humanitarian spirit has taken him across the world, where he has provided essential dental care to underserved communities, including Tibetan refugees, Nepalese monks, and Guatemalan farmworkers. Dr. Chau’s interests extend far beyond dentistry. An aficionado of Broadway musicals, the Star Wars saga, and Frank Herbert’s Dune series, he also has a deep appreciation for history—particularly the Napoleonic era. His love of cuisine, shaped by his Vietnamese heritage, is reflected in his fondness for French-Vietnamese gastronomy. A dedicated advocate of health and wellness, he finds balance through weight training, reinforcing his commitment to a life of discipline and vitality. Dr. L. James Chau’s story is one of passion, purpose, and an enduring dedication to bettering the lives of others. His remarkable career, artistic pursuits, and humanitarian efforts embody a rare fusion of excellence, creativity, and compassion—leaving a lasting impact on the world and the communities he serves.
content.rendered:

Dr. L. James Chau’s journey is a testament to unwavering dedication, remarkable achievement, and a profound commitment to serving others—both in his community and across the globe. Born in Vietnam and raised in the vibrant city of San Diego, California, Dr. Chau exhibited academic excellence from an early age, graduating as Valedictorian of his high school class in 2001. Recognized for his exceptional promise, Dr. Chau was awarded a full scholarship to the prestigious New York University (NYU) College of Dentistry, one of the nation’s foremost institutions. His commitment to clinical excellence led him to NYU Langone Hospital, where he completed an Advanced Education in General Dentistry (AEGD) residency. There, his dedication to patient care earned him the Outstanding Service Award for Patient Care, a reflection of his compassion, skill, and pursuit of excellence. As past President of the American Dental Education Association (ADEA) – NYU Chapter and a member of NYU’s Ethics Peer Review Board, he played a vital role in upholding the highest standards of integrity within the profession.

Dr. Chau’s passion for service extended beyond the clinic. As a National Health Service Corps Scholar, he fulfilled a significant service commitment with the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, providing critical dental care to underserved communities. Upon returning to Southern California, he established his practice in Newport Beach, where he seamlessly blends his extensive expertise with a heartfelt dedication to patient care. His commitment to innovation and excellence recently earned him the distinction of Certified Fellow in BioMimetic Dentistry, making him the only dentist in Orange County—and one of just ten worldwide—to hold this prestigious title, awarded by the Academy of BioMimetic Dentistry.

Beyond his professional endeavors, Dr. Chau is a man of diverse passions. His artistic eye finds expression in photography, capturing breathtaking landscapes and high-fashion portraits. A fluent speaker of both Vietnamese and English, he fosters an inclusive and welcoming environment for patients from all backgrounds. His humanitarian spirit has taken him across the world, where he has provided essential dental care to underserved communities, including Tibetan refugees, Nepalese monks, and Guatemalan farmworkers.

Dr. Chau’s interests extend far beyond dentistry. An aficionado of Broadway musicals, the Star Wars saga, and Frank Herbert’s Dune series, he also has a deep appreciation for history—particularly the Napoleonic era. His love of cuisine, shaped by his Vietnamese heritage, is reflected in his fondness for French-Vietnamese gastronomy. A dedicated advocate of health and wellness, he finds balance through weight training, reinforcing his commitment to a life of discipline and vitality.

Dr. L. James Chau’s story is one of passion, purpose, and an enduring dedication to bettering the lives of others. His remarkable career, artistic pursuits, and humanitarian efforts embody a rare fusion of excellence, creativity, and compassion—leaving a lasting impact on the world and the communities he serves.

content.raw:
Dr. Nitin Raju graduated from the University of Michigan School of Dentistry. Following dental school, he did a six year residency in oral and maxillofacial surgery at University of Texas - San Antonio where he also earned a medical degree. Dr. Raju created his office South Austin Oral Surgery in 2023.

Dr. Raju's office is limited to dental extractions with the option of sedation. He is always interested in looking for ways to optimize patients for surgery as well as ways to improve post-operative healing. He offers platelet rich fibrin (PRF), diode laser photobiomodulation (PBM), bone grafting, ozone injection, and piezo socket debridement at the time of dental extraction.
content.rendered:
Dr. Nitin Raju graduated from the University of Michigan School of Dentistry. Following dental school, he did a six year residency in oral and maxillofacial surgery at University of Texas – San Antonio where he also earned a medical degree. Dr. Raju created his office South Austin Oral Surgery in 2023.

Dr. Raju’s office is limited to dental extractions with the option of sedation. He is always interested in looking for ways to optimize patients for surgery as well as ways to improve post-operative healing. He offers platelet rich fibrin (PRF), diode laser photobiomodulation (PBM), bone grafting, ozone injection, and piezo socket debridement at the time of dental extraction.

content.raw:
Dr. Armando Ponte is a general and cosmetic dentist originally from Toronto, Canada. He completed his Doctor of Dental Surgery degree at the prestigious Schulich School of Medicine & Dentistry in London Ontario. Dr. Ponte served as President of the International Alpha Omega Dental Society (London, ON chapter), while maintaining his position on the Dean's Honour List. He currently resides and practices Dentistry in sunny South Florida.

Dr. Ponte strongly believes in patient outreach and continuing education. Throughout his academic years, Dr. Ponte pursued numerous developmental opportunities, including volunteering on a mission trip abroad, where he provided dental care to an underserved community. Dr. Ponte has completed advanced training in orthodontics and surgery allowing him to provide comprehensive care that integrates alignment, function & aesthetics.

Dr. Ponte prides himself in providing patients with a multi-disciplinary and holistic approach to oral health. This involves working with various disciplines of healthcare, including sleep medicine, nutrition, meditation, myofunctional therapy and other disciplines to optimize oral and general health and cater to an array of patient needs. He utilizes a calm and friendly approach to manage patient anxiety and put his patients at ease.

Dr. Ponte provides a range of dental services across all ages, with a focus on creating healthy and beautiful smiles through techniques such as digital smile design, composite and porcelain veneers, dental implants and Invisalign. With years of experience and having crafted hundreds of smiles and thousands of veneers, Dr. Ponte truly understands how a great smile can boost patients’ confidence and overall well-being.

Dr. Ponte is a member of the International Academy of Oral Medicine and Toxicology, the International Academy of Biological Dentistry & Medicine, and an ambassador with The Breathe Institute in Beverly Hills, California. His past memberships include the International Association for Orthodontics, the American Academy of Clear Aligners, the Canadian Academy of Clinical Sleep Disorders Disciplines, and the Ontario Dental Association.

Outside of the office, Dr. Ponte enjoys cooking, functional fitness, travelling, and spending time with family and friends.

content.raw:
Renewal Dental Arts is a biologically focused dental practice located in San Antonio, TX.
We blend advanced technology with holistic principles to provide comprehensive care that supports whole-body wellness. Our services include safe mercury amalgam removal, ozone therapy, biocompatible materials, biological periodontal care, and minimally invasive restorative dentistry. Every treatment is guided by a commitment to patient safety, long-term health, and personalized care.

content.raw: Board Certified Pediatric Dentist, Advanced Specialty in Airway Health, Laser Dentistry and Preventive Orthodontics -Welcome to Smile Wellness Hoboken, the leading boutique dental practice dedicated to patients from infancy to adulthood. Led by Dr. Kapoor, who boasts extensive experience as a top laser dental provider in the Tri-State area and is an affiliate of the esteemed Breathe Institute. She uses her genuine first hand experience navigating personal and family health into her practice style. Her state of the art practice features laser dentistry, low level red light therapy, organic/bio-compatible materials, sleep tests, CBCT airway imaging. Our mission is to treat oral wellness in the least invasive and holistic way.

content.raw: At Rise Dental, we’re modernizing biological dentistry—bringing together the science of biomimetic care with today’s technology and a deep respect for whole-body health. We go beyond detox and trends, offering ozone therapy, fluoride-free remineralization, airway screenings, and regenerative treatments like PRF in a space designed for clarity, connection, and longevity. For patients who want care that’s smart, safe, and built to last, Rise is what’s next.
